module_name: GBM Responder Analysis — GLASS, TCGA, CGGA Cohorts
description: Cross-cohort responder analysis in GBM using OS ≥ 18 months as the responder definition. Covers three independent cohorts (GLASS, TCGA PanCan2018, CGGA IDH-wt) with KM survival analysis and molecular signal validation (ZEB1, SOX2 expression deltas in GLASS).

responder_definition.rationale: 18-month OS is the established landmark for GBM long-term survival; aligns with Stupp protocol follow-up convention

ZEB1_delta.interpretation: ZEB1 expression decreases more in non-responders — consistent with mesenchymal escape under treatment pressure

SOX2_delta.interpretation: SOX2 expression decreases more in non-responders — stemness marker suppression associated with non-response

km_results.interpretation: Responders survive 2.6× longer than non-responders across 580 patients
Responders survive 3.9× longer than non-responders — largest ratio across GBM cohorts

cross_cohort_summary.consistency: Responder signal is consistent across all three independent GBM cohorts

stemness_veto_context.veto_rule: HARD veto (×0.0) for SOX2, CD44, PROM1, SOX9, Wnt, Notch, Hedgehog MoAs in recurrent/relapsed/progressive GBM
stemness_veto_context.soft_penalty_rule: SOFT penalty (×0.15) for PI3K/mTOR, STAT3, HDAC, EZH2, BMI1, LIF/gp130 MoAs
stemness_veto_context.trigger: disease ∈ {gbm, glioblastoma} AND setting ∈ {recurrent, relapsed, progressive}
